mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_summary_report WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY order_id LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_summary_report WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
SELECT s.*, t.task_name AS task_name FROM t_summary_report s LEFT JOIN t_profit_calculation_task t ON s.task_id = t.task_id ORDER BY s.task_id, s.order_id LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT * FROM t_summary_report WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY order_id
